allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\(''lucide-react''\); const names = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => /github|instagram|linkedin|twitter|x$/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\(names\);")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\(''lucide-react''\); const names = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => !k.startsWith\(''Lucide''\) && /^[A-Z]/.test\(k\)\); console.log\(names.slice\(0,20\)\); console.log\(''total:'', names.length\);")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\(''lucide-react''\); console.log\(l.Github ? ''Github exists'' : ''no Github''\); console.log\(Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k=> k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''link''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''external''\)\).slice\(0,10\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\(''lucide-react''\); const check = [''Globe'',''Mail'',''Code2'',''GitBranch'',''Camera'',''Briefcase'',''X'',''Terminal'',''User'',''Link'']; check.forEach\(n => console.log\(n, !!l[n]\)\);")
